message:
feat(fwc): port new_cmd scaffolding, wire dispatch, expand template tests

- Port new_cmd.rs (3703 lines, 67 tests) from retired fcp-cli: connector
  scaffolding with compliance prechecks, archetype matrix, manifest generation
- Wire New and Bench commands into main.rs passthrough + structured dispatch
- Add 17 template rendering acceptance tests to render.rs (99→116 total):
  HTML escaping disabled, literal text + variables, unless blocks, invoke
  output shape, combined helpers in loops, deeply nested access, edge cases
- Fix config_dispatch signature mismatch (pre-existing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
